summary: Tested Booking Confirmation page for B2B travel platform. All backend API tests passed (11/11). All frontend UI tests passed. The page correctly displays traveler forms, validation, payment options, and integrates with the booking API.

minor.issue: Fixed jwt.JWTError to jwt.exceptions.DecodeError - PyJWT library uses different exception class

issues: HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - React rendering issue in table structure (pre-existing, not blocking)
HTML hydration warning: <option> cannot be child of <span> - React rendering issue with select options (pre-existing, not blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: The hydration warnings in MyProposals.jsx and BookingConfirmation.jsx are caused by React wrapper spans around table rows and select options - should be fixed for cleaner React rendering but not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Used existing test proposal EF0A82F (Trip to Tbilisi with 3 cities, 2 adults)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking Confirmation page fully tested. Navigation flow: Login > My Leads > View Proposal > BOOK NOW > I Understand, Continue to Book. The page shows 2 traveler forms for 2 adults in 1 room. Form validation works correctly - requires all traveler fields and consent checkbox. Timestamp is recorded on confirmation. Payment processing is MOCKED (shows alert only).

booking_confirmation_page.Traveler Details section: PASSED - 2 adult forms shown (Room 1 Traveler 1, Room 1 Traveler 2)
booking_confirmation_page.Special Occasion section: PASSED - 4 radio options (None, Birthday, Honeymoon, Anniversary)
booking_confirmation_page.Guaranteed Security section: PASSED - PayPal, VISA, MasterCard, AMEX logos

right_sidebar.Coupon section: PASSED - input and Apply Discount button

form_validation.Empty form validation: PASSED - 'Please complete all required fields for Traveler 1'
form_validation.Consent checkbox validation: PASSED - 'You must check the consent box...'

mocked_apis_note: Payment processing is MOCKED - onConfirmBooking shows alert only. Google Sheets sync, PayPal checkout are also MOCKED as per original spec.
